titleStmt.title: SII 38.480: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 480. (A.R. No. 480 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravarttin Rājarāja III Year [3]0, Kanni śu. di. 5, Sunday, Uttiraṭṭādi = 1246 A.D. Other details are irregular.

summary.p: Middle portion of the record is damaged. It records that a lady (name lost) deposited 4500 kāśu in the temple treasury for purchasing land from the temple at Tiruttuṟaippūṇḍi (tirunāmattukkāṇi) for feeding the wandering ascetics (dēśāndri) daily with two naḻi of rice and vegetables.

Śrīmāhēśvarappiriyan, the temple accountant (kōyiṟkaṇakku), Tiruchchiṟṟambala Bhaṭṭaṉ, the temple official (dēvakaṉmi), Villavadaraiyaṉ, the temple servant (śrīkāriyam) and a certain Śivajñānasambandan figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravat
tikaḷ śrī �tevarkkuRead rājarājatevarkkuyāṇṭu
3 10 tāvatu kannināyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣattu pañcamiyum nāyaṟṟu
kkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭā
ti nāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruttaṟaippūṇ
ṭi Uṭaiya lle cā yuka
kuṭiyilirukkum vuṭaiyā
ṉ pāriyai muṉ Oṭuk
ku vaikkappeṟa veṇumeṉṟum
Itukku tirunāmattukkāṇi koṇ
ṭu viṭa veṇumeṉṟu collukai
yil paṟṟum nilam kiṭṭiṉa Iṭattile
koḷvatāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Ivaḷ
Oṭukkiṉa kācu 1000 5 100 Ikkācu nālā
yirattaññūṟum cipaṇṭārat kai
k koṇṭu Oru tirumuṉoṭukkukaikku
Irunāḻi Ariciyum kaṟiamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa vi
ñcaṉamum kūṭa paṭaittu tecāntirikaḷu
kku vaḻaṅkakkaṭavatāka Ikkācu Upaiya
māka Innāḷ mutal cantirātittavaraiy O
ṭukku vaḻaṅkak kaṭavatāka nitaraimaik
kuRead niccayittamaikkuIvai koyiṟkaṇakku śrīmaheśva
rapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tevakaṉmi tiru
cciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu śrīkāriyam vil
lavatarayaṉe(e)ḻuttu Akāraṇam ci
vañāṉacampantaṉeḻuttu svastiśrī ...
Digital edition of SII 38.480 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
